headline: Is INTU Stock a Buy, Hold or Sell After Its 42.8% Plunge in 6 Months?
summary: Intuit tumbles 42.8% in 6 months despite strong Q2 FY26; AI-HI growth and mid-market push clash with Mailchimp drag and rising costs.

raw.headline: Is INTU Stock a Buy, Hold or Sell After Its 42.8% Plunge in 6 Months?
raw.summary: Intuit tumbles 42.8% in 6 months despite strong Q2 FY26; AI-HI growth and mid-market push clash with Mailchimp drag and rising costs.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Autodesk, Lowers Price Target to $300
summary: Barclays  analyst Saket Kalia   maintains Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $315 to $300.
